h1.visual_description: Bold, larger font size, left-aligned, prefixed with a section number followed by a period.
h1.example_text: 8. Numerical computations in the combinatorial multiverse

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Figure caption label (often followed by italicized description)

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX (inline: $...$, block: centered with right-aligned numbering in parentheses)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Running header at top left (e.g., 'Probability, Combinatorics and Control'); Page number at bottom left (e.g., '318')
